description: Academy Award–winning composer and producer behind Ryan Coogler's entire filmography. Göransson scored Fruitvale Station, Creed, Black Panther (Oscar winner), Black Panther: Wakanda Forever, and Sinners — blending orchestral, electronic, and African musical traditions into groundbreaking film scores.
